conjecture.statement: AI tutors should replace traditional homework for middle-school students.

background.short_context: Debate whether AI tutors should replace traditional homework, not whether AI tutors are useful in general.

rubric_notes: discuss equity, feedback quality, cheating, and motivation

pro.name: stub-pro-v1
pro.description: Deterministic pro agent for local tests and examples.

con.name: stub-con-v1
con.description: Deterministic con agent for local tests and examples.

transcript.speaker: pro
transcript.text: Pro opening: Replacement deserves a fair trial when it improves feedback speed, personalization, and accountability. No prior claims have been made. The burden is to compare replacement against supplementation, not against doing nothing.

transcript.speaker: con
transcript.text: Con opening: Replacement is too strong because homework also builds practice habits, teacher context, and equitable routines. Prior claims: pro_opening. The burden is to compare replacement against supplementation, not against doing nothing.

transcript.speaker: pro
transcript.text: Pro rebuttal: Replacement deserves a fair trial when it improves feedback speed, personalization, and accountability. Prior claims: pro_opening, con_opening. The burden is to compare replacement against supplementation, not against doing nothing.

transcript.speaker: con
transcript.text: Con rebuttal: Replacement is too strong because homework also builds practice habits, teacher context, and equitable routines. Prior claims: pro_opening, con_opening, pro_rebuttal. The burden is to compare replacement against supplementation, not against doing nothing.

transcript.speaker: pro
transcript.text: Pro closing: Replacement deserves a fair trial when it improves feedback speed, personalization, and accountability. Prior claims: pro_opening, con_opening, pro_rebuttal, con_rebuttal. The burden is to compare replacement against supplementation, not against doing nothing.

transcript.speaker: con
transcript.text: Con closing: Replacement is too strong because homework also builds practice habits, teacher context, and equitable routines. Prior claims: pro_opening, con_opening, pro_rebuttal, con_rebuttal, pro_closing. The burden is to compare replacement against supplementation, not against doing nothing.

decisive_moments.reason: Con produced the stronger deterministic stub case under the public rubric.
